name: Userback Visual Feedback API
what_it_does: Visual user feedback and bug reporting platform with REST API — enabling users to annotate screenshots, record video feedback, and submit bug reports directly in apps, with API for accessing feedback data and integrating with project management tools.
use_cases: Retrieving user-submitted visual feedback and bug reports for triage agents
Syncing Userback feedback to Jira, GitHub, or Trello via API integration
Querying feedback by status, type, or rating for automated prioritization workflows
Creating feedback items programmatically for internal testing workflows
Building notification agents that alert teams when critical feedback is received
not_for: Quantitative analytics and usage tracking (use Mixpanel or Amplitude)
Customer support ticketing with SLA management (use Freshdesk or Zendesk)
Session replay without specific visual annotation need
best_when: A product team needs in-app visual feedback collection with screenshot annotation and video recording, plus API access to sync feedback with development tools.
avoid_when: You need quantitative analytics, customer support workflows, or don't need visual annotation capabilities.

auth.notes: API token from Userback dashboard. Bearer token authentication. Workspace-scoped access. JS SDK uses public token for data collection. REST API uses private token for data retrieval.

pricing.paid_tiers: Startup from $59/month; Company from $119; Premium from $219
pricing.notes: Per-project pricing on higher tiers. Free tier very limited. Good for teams focused specifically on visual feedback and bug reporting. Australian company. Active development.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; not prominently documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers feedback items, projects, and users. Webhook support for new feedback events. JS SDK handles in-browser feedback collection. API focused on data retrieval more than creation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Feedback retrieval operations are idempotent reads. Feedback status updates are idempotent. Item creation may create duplicates — no deduplication built in.
known_agent_gotchas: Screenshot and video data stored as blob URLs — agents must download and store separately
Free tier very limited — not suitable for testing production workflows
Public/private token distinction — only private token for API queries
Feedback items include attachments that must be fetched separately from metadata

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Attachment storage secured with pre-signed URLs. Smaller team — formal compliance certifications not prominently listed.
